name: Physics-Informed Bayesian Lab Planner
goal: Use Bayesian active design with mechanistic priors to prioritize safe high-value experiments.

name: Program-Synthesis Experiment Compiler
goal: Compile protocol graphs into executable robotic workflows with automatic validity checks.

name: Debate-Verifier Mechanistic Ensemble
goal: Run adversarial specialist debates and verifier consensus for mechanism-grounded decisions.

name: Causal Transfer Twin with Domain Adaptation
goal: Leverage cross-lab causal transport to reduce data requirements under domain shift.

name: Hierarchical RL + Constraint Guardian
goal: Optimize long-horizon experiment policies with hard safety and budget-aware control.
